name: pdf-translate
description: 독립 PDF 통번역 서버 (HF Spaces Docker)

scripts.postinstall: (python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt || echo 'WARN: pymupdf venv setup failed — 번역 불가'); bash scripts/install-tectonic.sh || echo 'WARN: tectonic setup failed — 재조판(수식/스캔) 비활성, 빠른번역은 동작'
